notes: Lesson 7 orientation (act 38, 1009.9s / ~16.8min, 7 route-map cues @~144s). Walks the standard spiral-lesson-map route for the transformer lesson, reusing the shared transformer idiom library (pipeline map, token IDs, embedding table, L x D hidden matrix, residual/attention/MLP block pipeline, logits) so the orientation speaks the same visual vocabulary as the three lesson_part segments (39/40/41). Cue timeline was rescaled from a uniform 900s draft to the real 1009.896s MP3 before authoring. Two review iterations fixed: Cue04 rendered pseudocode as MathTex (run-together italics 'forblockinblocks') -> switched to color-coded monospace Text with indented loop body; Cue01 'the object on the bench' label collided with the title -> lowered the workshop composition. Per-cue checklist (legibility, highlight matches narration, contrast, nothing off-frame via theme.guard, chunk timing within pinning tolerance): all pass. Final 1009.736s vs audio 1009.896s (Δ0.164s<0.5). Note: cue06_end lands past the -shortest-trimmed video tail so only start/mid were sampled for cue6; the full composed Cue06 frame (recap map + takeaway + practice) was verified via a direct single-frame render.
